commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can align @auth/core with @convex-dev/auth 0.0.94 or remove that auth bump from this dependency batch.; Needs attention: No malicious dependency behavior is evident, but the unresolved auth-provider peer mismatch is security-sensitive because the repair affects the login stack.; Review finding: [P1] Keep @convex-dev/auth compatible with @auth/core — package.json:76 (sha=646a35d81e8f36656abf2f01e50915220273f246)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates seven production dependencies in the root app, Bun lockfile, and CLI/admin package manifests, including Convex/Auth, plugin-inspector, lucide-react, semver, and tailwindcss.

Reproducibility: yes. The current PR head reproduces the blocker in CI: ci:static runs check:peers and fails because @auth/core 0.37.4 does not satisfy @convex-dev/auth's ^0.41.1 peer range.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can align @auth/core with @convex-dev/auth 0.0.94 or remove that auth bump from this dependency batch.
